din-china.canApproveAlignedAsCandidateBasis: PENDING — requires Option B from basis decision pack

bridgeFactors.effect: Legacy roznamcha still gross-presents internal transfer legs as period cash-in/out. Aligned preview excludes 169 transfer rows from normal totals. Cash-in delta PKR 68,715,932 is dominated by transfer legs no longer counted in preview period cash-in.

Legacy path (getCashFlowReport → roznamchaService) vs unified ledger preview (get_unified_cash_bank_ledger) produce different row sets beyond transfers. 3B-F legacy-only net PKR -42,779,869; preview-only net PKR -88,455,142.

3B-F transfer_leg bucket: 80 rows, net PKR -56,889,891 (pre-alignment thematic). Post-alignment 169 rows excluded under Q5=C. Remaining sales_receipts and other modules still contribute unmatched legacy/preview-only rows.

din-china.conclusion: Closing Δ PKR 69,637,623 is expected when finance-approved preview basis (Q5=C) is compared to legacy that still includes transfers. Aligned preview is finance-basis clean; legacy mismatch is intentional until Option D or loader swap with finance sign-off.

bridgeFactors.effect: Two opening-balance rows excluded from normal period cash-in under Q4=A. Legacy still shows Jun 2026 opening/JE row as period cash-in (PKR 25,000 legacy-only row). Preview maps opening_balance_account rows differently.

bridgeFactors.factor: Row count match with amount mismatch
bridgeFactors.effect: 51 legacy rows = 51 preview rows, but cash-in differs PKR 832,850 because same transactions are classified differently (opening summary vs period cash-in, JE leg mapping). 48 strong matches; 1 legacy-only; 3 preview-only.
3B-F: legacy-only 1 row PKR 25,000 cash-in (2026-06-06); preview-only 3 rows net PKR 80,000. Opening_balance_account and payment allocation mapping drives residual without row-count change.

din-bridal.conclusion: Closing Δ PKR 857,850 is expected when Q4=A excludes opening rows from period totals while legacy counts them as cash-in. Row-count parity confirms this is classification/totals logic, not missing rows. Aligned preview is finance-basis clean; legacy mismatch expected.

din-couture.conclusion: ZERO-DIFF at summary. Candidate ready for finance review, but loader swap still requires separate operator approval and explicit finance sign-off. Official legacy unchanged.
